heading: Repealed. ,June 25, 1947, ch. 125, § 1661 Stat. 172
label: 121 to 134 Repealed. ,June 25, 1947, ch. 125, § 1661 Stat. 172
notes: Sections, , , formerly known as “The Insecticides Act”, are covered by subchapter II of this chapter.act Apr. 26, 1910, ch. 19136 Stat. 335

Effective Date of Repeal; Savings Provision, , repealed this subchapter effective one year after , and further provided that this subchapter should be deemed to remain in full force for the purpose of sustaining any proper suit, action, or other proceeding with respect to any violations, liabilities incurred, or appeals taken prior to such date of repeal or to sales, shipments, or deliveries of insecticides and fungicides exempted by the Secretary.Act June 25, 1947, ch. 125, § 1661 Stat. 172June 25, 1947
